Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Thanks for being so patient. That just about concludes your checkup.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Sorry yours ended up taking so much longer than everyone else's.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If I'd known how long it would take, I would've scheduled an entire day for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Although, we could have done it another time and taken a full day for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Your Persona abilities are rather unusual compared to the others', aren't they?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}That's why we had to run so many more tests on you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Well, based on how you've performed so far, I don't expect there to be any problems...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Persona abilities can be dangerous, depending on how they're used.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}With that in mind, it can't hurt to err on the side of caution.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}How are you feeling about it? Do you have any concerns about your power?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And I don't think there will be any issues with your test results either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}That's understandable, but I don't think there will be any issues with your test results.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}And based on what I'm hearing from Kirijo-kun's reports, you've been performing just fine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I truly am grateful for everything the team has done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Things have really changed for the better since you arrived.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Our team has grown, and we've even figured out how we can eliminate the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}In a way, you've sort of gotten the clock ticking for us again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It's almost as if... we were just waiting for you these past ten years.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'm afraid I can only support you from behind the scenes, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I'll be counting on you to eliminate the four remaining Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Now then, it's getting pretty late. Why don't we get you back to the dor—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Oh! Thanks for your help the other day. Uh-huh... Yes... It's missing from that document?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like he received an urgent call...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should head back to the dorm alone.[n]{f 1 1}
